chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 684 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.5653/2025 (C/A) 02-10-2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Darya Khan, Assistant Commissioner, Kotdigi, Nazir Ahmed Mahar, Mukhtiarkar (Revenue) Kotdigi and Imdad, Tapedar Layari >>>>>><<<<<<< Respondent No.4/Assistant Commissioner, Kotdigi present in Court files statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned Counsel for the Petitioner. The Assistant Commissioner submits that the Application filed by the Petitioner has been assigned to him and further undertakes that he will pass a speaking order on the said application, after hearing the parties concerned, in accordance with the law. In view of above, the listed Contempt Application is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
